description.value:
While moving on land, you ignore any difficult terrain caused by plants, fungi, or uneven ground. When you succeed at a skill check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Recall Knowledge] about a creature with the animal, beast, fungus, or plant trait, you gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speeds for the rest of your turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Trailblazing Stride]
